Protein names: 23S rRNA (guanine(745)-N(1))-methyltransferase (EC 2.1.1.187) (23S rRNA m1G745 methyltransferase) (Ribosomal RNA large subunit methyltransferase A)
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. RlmA family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=guanosine(745) in 23S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = N(1)-methylguanosine(745) in 23S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:42900, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10273, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10274, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:73542, ChEBI:CHEBI:74269; EC=2.1.1.187; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:9440525};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Specifically methylates the guanosine in position 745 of 23S rRNA. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:9440525}.
